name: Diablo (SS-479)
events: 7 May 1945 Having completed a period of trials and training in the Portsmouth area, USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island for torpedo trials.
10 May 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN), departed Newport for New London, Connecticut.
29 May 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) departed from New London, Connecticut bound for Key West, Florida.
4 Jun 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida.
5 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
6 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
7 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
8 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
9 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
11 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
12 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
13 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
14 Jun 1945 USS Diablo conducted exercises off Key West.
15 Jun 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) departed Key West, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone.
19 Jun 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone.
4 Jul 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
21 Jul 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
10 Aug 1945 USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to proceed to Saipan.
22 Aug 1945 After the end of hostilities USS Diablo (Lt.Cdr. G.G. Matherson) was ordered to proceed to Guam, where she arrived on this day.

1 Sep 1945 The submarine tender USS Fulton (T/Capt. A.R. St. Angelo, USN) and the submarines USS Manta (T/Lt.Cdr. E.P. Madley, USN), USS Dentuda (T/Lt.Cdr. E.E. Conrad, USN), USS Argonaut (T/Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) and USS Diablo (T/Cdr. G.G. Matheson, USN) departed Guam for Pearl Harbor where they arrived on 10 September 1945.
11 Sep 1945 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) departed Pearl Harbor for San Francisco.
She was in company with USS Argonaut (T/Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) and USS Diablo (T/Cdr. G.G. Matheson, USN) which were to proceed to Balboa, Panama Canal Zone.
[It is currently not known to us when they parted company with each other.]
